subtasks.description: Query spend data for current month and 3-month historical average, calculate variance and z-score for anomaly detection
Classify anomalies based on variance thresholds: normal_variance (z-score < 1.5), concerning (z-score 1.5-2.5), critical (z-score > 2.5)

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks needed: (1) sql_gen (mid tier) to compute current vs. 3-month baseline with variance/z-score metrics—requires multi-month aggregation and window functions to calculate rolling averages; (2) cross_recon (mid tier) to classify results by threshold rules. Classification is included in cross_recon per task scope, avoiding a separate policy_action. Mid tier for both: sql_gen handles multi-temporal aggregation; cross_recon applies multi-threshold logic. No frontier tier needed—this is straightforward variance analysis without complex inference.

output.sql:
SELECT
  publisher,
  product,
  current_month_spend,
  avg_3month_spend,
  stddev_3month_spend,
  current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend AS variance_usd,
  CASE
    WHEN stddev_3month_spend = 0 OR stddev_3month_spend IS NULL THEN 0
    ELSE (current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend) / stddev_3month_spend
  END AS z_score,
  CASE
    WHEN stddev_3month_spend = 0 OR stddev_3month_spend IS NULL THEN 'normal_variance'
    WHEN ABS((current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend) / stddev_3month_spend) < 1.5 THEN 'normal_variance'
    WHEN ABS((current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend) / stddev_3month_spend) < 2.5 THEN 'concerning'
    ELSE 'critical'
  END AS anomaly_classification
FROM (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    product,
    SUM(CASE
      WHEN event_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
       AND event_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month'
      THEN amount_usd ELSE 0
    END) AS current_month_spend,
    AVG(CASE
      WHEN event_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
       AND event_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
      THEN monthly_spend ELSE NULL
    END) AS avg_3month_spend,
    STDDEV(CASE
      WHEN event_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
       AND event_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
      THEN monthly_spend ELSE NULL
    END) AS stddev_3month_spend
  FROM (
    SELECT
      publisher,
      product,
      DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date) AS event_month,
      event_date,
      SUM(amount_usd) OVER (
        PARTITION BY publisher, product, DATE_TRUNC('month', event_date)
      ) AS monthly_spend
    FROM consumption_facts
    WHERE
      event_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months'
      AND amount_usd IS NOT NULL
  ) monthly_data
  GROUP BY publisher, product
) anomaly_base
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN stddev_3month_spend = 0 OR stddev_3month_spend IS NULL THEN 0
    ELSE ABS((current_month_spend - avg_3month_spend) / stddev_3month_spend)
  END DESC
